items.title: Idomoo launches Strata – the first AI foundation model for layered video
items.summary:
The Israeli video personalisation company is launching Strata, a foundation model it says produces separate, editable layers for text, animation, footage, and actors rather than a single flat file. It’s a direct challenge to the architectural limits of diffusion-based video generators. Every AI video model currently on the market produces the same thing: a flat […]
This story continues at The Next Web

items.title: How Autonomous AI Agents Become Secure by Design With NVIDIA OpenShell
items.summary: Autonomous agents mark a new inflection point in AI. Systems are no longer limited to generating responses or reasoning through tasks. They can take action: Agents can read files, use tools, write and run code, and execute workflows across enterprise systems, all while expanding their own capabilities.  Application-layer risk grows exponentially when agents continuously improve […]

items.title: How to Design a Production-Ready AI Agent That Automates Google Colab Workflows Using Colab-MCP, MCP Tools, FastMCP, and Kernel Execution
items.summary:
In this tutorial, we build an advanced, hands-on tutorial around Google’s newly released colab-mcp, an open-source MCP (Model Context Protocol) server that lets any AI agent programmatically control Google Colab notebooks and runtimes. Across five self-contained snippets, we go from first principles to production-ready patterns. We start by constructing a minimal MCP tool registry from […]
The post How to Design a Production-Ready AI Agent That Automates Google Colab Workflows Using Colab-MCP, MCP Tools, FastMCP, and Kernel Execution appeared first on MarkTechPost.

items.title: Quoting Neurotica
items.summary:
slop is something that takes more human effort to consume than it took to produce. When my coworker sends me raw Gemini output he’s not expressing his freedom to create, he’s disrespecting the value of my time
— Neurotica, @schwarzgerat.bsky.social

    Tags: ai-ethics, slop, generative-ai, ai, llms

items.title: Bernie Sanders’ AI ‘gotcha’ video flops, but the memes are great
items.summary: Sen. Bernie Sanders thinks he's tricked Claude into revealing the AI industry's secrets, but he really just exposed how agreeable chatbots can become.

items.title: Musk Unites Tesla, SpaceX, xAI for Texas Chip Plant
items.summary:
Musk’s Terafab plan ties Tesla, SpaceX, and xAI to a new Texas chip push, but the biggest factory may not end up in Austin.
The post Musk Unites Tesla, SpaceX, xAI for Texas Chip Plant appeared first on TechRepublic.

items.title: GeoChallenge: A Multi-Answer Multiple-Choice Benchmark for Geometric Reasoning with Diagrams
datasette-files 0.1a2
items.summary:
Release: datasette-files 0.1a2
    The most interesting alpha of datasette-files yet, a new plugin which adds the ability to upload files directly into a Datasette instance. Here are the release notes in full:


Columns are now configured using the new column_types system from Datasette 1.0a26. #8
New file_actions plugin hook, plus ability to import an uploaded CSV/TSV file to a table. #10
UI for uploading multiple files at once via the new documented JSON upload API. #11
Thumbnails are now generated for image files and stored in an internal datasette_files_thumbnails table. #13

items.title: Elizabeth Warren calls Pentagon’s decision to bar Anthropic ‘retaliation’
items.summary: In a letter to Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth, Senator Elizabeth Warren (D-MA) equated the DOD's decision to label Anthropic a "supply-chain risk" as retaliation, arguing that the Pentagon could simply have terminated its contract with the AI lab.

items.title: Sam Altman-backed fusion startup Helion in talks with OpenAI
items.summary: Helion is reportedly negotiating a deal that would see it sell 12.5% of its power output to OpenAI.

items.title: Sam Altman-backed fusion startup Helion in talks to sell power to OpenAI
items.summary: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman is stepping down as board chair of Helion. His departure comes as reports that the two companies are negotiating a deal that would see Helion sell 12.5% of its power output to OpenAI.
